title: eucalyptus pauciflora subsp. parvifructa
intro: Eucalyptus pauciflora subsp. parvifructa, also known as the Alpine Snow Gum, is a subspecies of eucalyptus native to the mountainous regions of Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural decongestant and anti-inflammatory, due to the presence of eucalyptol and other essential oils. The health benefits of Eucalyptus pauciflora subsp. parvifructa include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, which can be used in aromatherapy, as well as tinctures and infusions that can be used to make teas and other medicinal remedies.
